hero.headline: Beauty Redefined
hero.subheadline: Aesthetic medicine & Plastic surgery in Tangier

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Personalised treatments to reveal your natural beauty
services.overview_subtitle: Discover our full range of medical and aesthetic protocols, designed to reveal your natural beauty with precision and care.
services.explorer_headline: What would you like to enhance?
services.explorer_subtitle: Select an area to discover tailored treatments

botox.name: Botox
botox.description: Botulinum toxin injections to smooth expression lines and prevent the formation of new wrinkles. A quick, precise treatment performed by Dr. Meryem for a naturally refreshed appearance.
botox.process: Consultation → Facial analysis → Targeted injections → Results visible in 3–7 days
botox.page_subtitle: Smooth expression lines for a naturally refreshed look
botox.step1_desc: Dr. Meryem analyses your facial expressions, skin quality and aesthetic goals to create a tailored injection plan.
botox.step2_desc: Precise identification of injection points based on your unique facial anatomy and the areas to be treated.
botox.step3_desc: Quick, precise micro-injections using ultra-fine needles. The procedure takes 15–20 minutes with minimal discomfort.
botox.step4_desc: Results appear within 3–7 days. Your expressions remain natural while wrinkles are visibly smoothed.
botox.forWho: Ideal for men and women who wish to reduce forehead lines, frown lines or crow's feet. Also excellent as a preventive treatment from the late twenties. Suitable for all skin types.
botox.faq1_a: The injections use ultra-fine needles and are generally very well tolerated. Most patients describe a slight pinch sensation. No anaesthesia is required.
botox.faq2_q: How long do the results last?
botox.faq2_a: Results typically last 4 to 6 months. Regular maintenance sessions help maintain a consistent, natural appearance over time.
botox.faq3_q: Will I look frozen or unnatural?
botox.faq3_a: At Refine Clinic, Dr. Meryem uses precise, conservative doses to preserve your natural expressions. The goal is always to enhance, never to freeze.
botox.faq4_q: When can I return to normal activities?
botox.faq4_a: You can resume your daily activities immediately. We simply recommend avoiding intense exercise and lying down for 4 hours after treatment.

fillers.name: Dermal Fillers
fillers.description: Hyaluronic acid injections to restore volume, define contours and rejuvenate the face. Expert technique by Dr. Meryem for harmonious, natural results.
fillers.process: Consultation → Facial analysis → Precise injections → Immediate results
fillers.page_subtitle: Restore volume and define your features with expert precision
fillers.step1_desc: Dr. Meryem evaluates your facial proportions, discusses your goals and recommends the most suitable filler type and volume.
fillers.step2_desc: A personalised injection plan is created based on your facial anatomy — lips, cheekbones, jawline, nasolabial folds or dark circles.
fillers.step3_desc: Using cannulas or fine needles, hyaluronic acid is placed precisely at the target areas. Results are visible immediately.
fillers.step4_desc: Natural-looking volume and definition that enhances your features. A follow-up appointment ensures your complete satisfaction.
fillers.forWho: Suitable for anyone wishing to add volume to lips, restore cheek fullness, define the jawline, smooth nasolabial folds or reduce under-eye hollows. Popular from the mid-twenties onwards for both enhancement and rejuvenation.
fillers.faq1_q: Which areas can be treated with fillers?
fillers.faq1_a: The most common areas include lips, cheekbones, jawline, chin, nasolabial folds (smile lines), marionette lines and under-eye hollows (dark circles).
fillers.faq2_a: Yes. Hyaluronic acid fillers can be dissolved with an enzyme called hyaluronidase if needed, making this one of the safest aesthetic treatments available.
fillers.faq3_a: Depending on the area treated and the product used, results last between 8 and 18 months. Lip fillers typically last 8–12 months, while cheek and jawline fillers can last up to 18 months.
fillers.faq4_a: Mild swelling or bruising may occur for 2–3 days. Most patients return to their normal routine the same day. We provide aftercare instructions to minimise any side effects.

threads.name: Thread Lift
threads.description: PDO thread lifting to tighten and lift sagging skin without surgery. A minimally invasive technique that stimulates natural collagen production for progressive, lasting results.
threads.process: Consultation → Local anaesthesia → Thread placement → Progressive results over 2–3 months
threads.page_subtitle: Lift and tighten without surgery using absorbable threads
threads.step1_desc: Dr. Meryem assesses your skin laxity, discusses your goals and determines the optimal thread type and placement strategy.
threads.step2_desc: Local anaesthesia is applied to ensure your comfort. The treatment areas are precisely marked according to the lifting plan.
threads.step3_desc: Fine PDO threads are placed beneath the skin using thin needles. The procedure takes 30–60 minutes depending on the areas treated.
threads.step4_desc: Immediate subtle lift with continued improvement over 2–3 months as the threads stimulate collagen production around them.
threads.forWho: Ideal for patients in their 30s to 50s experiencing early to moderate skin laxity who want a lifting effect without surgery. Commonly used for the mid-face, jowls, jawline, neck and eyebrow area.
threads.faq1_q: How long does the procedure take?
threads.faq1_a: A thread lift typically takes 30 to 60 minutes depending on the number of threads and areas treated. It is performed under local anaesthesia.
threads.faq2_a: Most patients experience mild swelling and tenderness for 3–5 days. You should avoid vigorous exercise and extreme facial movements for about 2 weeks.
threads.faq3_a: The lifting effect lasts 12 to 18 months. The collagen stimulation continues to improve skin quality even after the threads have been absorbed.
threads.faq4_q: Can threads be combined with other treatments?
threads.faq4_a: Yes. Thread lifts work beautifully with Botox, fillers and skin treatments for a comprehensive rejuvenation approach. Dr. Meryem will recommend the ideal combination for your needs.

laser.name: Laser Hair Removal
laser.description: Permanent removal of unwanted hair using the latest laser technology. Treatments for all body and facial areas.
laser.process: Consultation → Skin test → Sessions (6–8 spaced 4–6 weeks apart) → Permanent results
laser.page_subtitle: Smooth, lasting skin with the latest laser technologies
laser.step1_desc: Assessment of your skin type, complexion and areas to be treated with Dr. Meryem.
laser.step2_desc: Laser application on a small test area to validate your skin's response before treatment.
laser.step3_desc: 6 to 8 sessions spaced 4 to 6 weeks apart for an optimal and lasting result.
laser.step4_desc: Lastingly smooth skin. Annual maintenance may be sufficient depending on the areas treated.
laser.forWho: Ideal for anyone wishing to be free from the constraints of shaving or waxing. Our technologies are suitable for all skin types, from the lightest to the darkest. Suitable for both women and men for all body and facial areas.
laser.faq1_a: Generally, 6 to 8 sessions are needed to achieve significant permanent reduction. The exact number varies depending on the area treated, your skin type and hair cycle.
laser.faq2_a: Our latest generation equipment includes integrated cooling systems. The sensation is comparable to a slight tingling, generally very well tolerated.
laser.faq3_a: All areas of the body and face: underarms, bikini line, legs, arms, back, face, upper lip, and many more.
laser.faq4_q: Is any preparation required before the session?
laser.faq4_a: It is recommended to shave the area to be treated 24 hours before the session. Avoid sun exposure and self-tanners 2 weeks before treatment.

face.name: Facial Treatment
face.description: Bespoke protocols to hydrate, brighten and rejuvenate your skin. Suitable for all skin types.
face.process: Skin diagnosis → Personalised treatment → Mask → Post-treatment care
face.page_subtitle: Bespoke protocols to reveal your skin's natural radiance
face.step1_desc: Precise analysis of your skin type, specific needs and current beauty routine.
face.step2_desc: Application of the most suitable active ingredients for your skin: moisturisers, antioxidants, gentle acids or rebalancing agents.
face.step3_desc: Nourishing, purifying or plumping mask according to the needs identified during the diagnosis.
face.step4_desc: Personalised recommendations to extend the benefits of the treatment at home.
face.forWho: This treatment is suitable for all skin types, regardless of age. Whether you want to combat dehydration, early signs of ageing, blemishes or a dull complexion, a personalised protocol is available for you.
face.faq1_a: A monthly session is recommended to maintain optimal radiance and support the skin's natural cell renewal.
face.faq2_q: Is my treatment suitable for sensitive skin?
face.faq2_a: Absolutely. We only select active ingredients well tolerated by sensitive skin. The initial diagnosis identifies your sensitivities.
face.faq3_q: What results can I expect from the first session?
face.faq3_a: Visible radiance, a feeling of hydrated and smoothed skin, and an even complexion are observable from the moment you leave the cabin.
face.faq4_q: Should I avoid make-up after the treatment?
face.faq4_a: It is advisable to avoid make-up for 4 to 6 hours after the treatment to allow the active ingredients to work fully.

peeling.name: Chemical Peel
peeling.description: Controlled chemical exfoliation to erase imperfections, dark spots and texture irregularities.
peeling.process: Consultation → Acid application → Neutralisation → Post-peel care
peeling.page_subtitle: Medical exfoliation for luminous, refined skin
peeling.step1_desc: Assessment of your skin, your expectations and selection of the most suitable type and concentration of acid.
peeling.step2_desc: Careful and precise application of the exfoliating agent to targeted areas by the practitioner.
peeling.step3_desc: Stopping the chemical action and applying soothing treatments to calm the skin immediately.
peeling.step4_desc: Intensive hydration, sun protection and advice to support optimal skin regeneration.
peeling.forWho: Chemical peel is indicated for skin with pigmentation spots, mild acne scars, irregular texture or a dull complexion. Suitable for adults seeking effective and visible skin renewal.
peeling.faq1_a: You will feel a slight tingling or warm sensation during application. This is temporary and generally well tolerated by the majority of patients.
peeling.faq2_a: Depending on the depth of the peel, slight flaking may occur for 3 to 7 days. No time off work is necessary for superficial peels.
peeling.faq3_q: Can I sun bathe after a peel?
peeling.faq3_a: Sun exposure must be avoided for 2 to 4 weeks after treatment and SPF 50+ sunscreen applied daily.
peeling.faq4_a: 1 to 3 sessions depending on the problem being treated, spaced 4 weeks apart. Results improve progressively after each session.

meso.name: Mesotherapy & PRP
meso.description: Injection of vitamin cocktails or platelet-rich plasma to deeply regenerate the skin.
meso.process: Collection/Preparation → Microneedling or injections → Soothing care
meso.page_subtitle: Deep cellular regeneration for revitalised, luminous skin
meso.step1_desc: For PRP, a blood sample is taken and centrifuged to extract the platelet-enriched plasma.
meso.step2_desc: Application of the vitamin cocktail or PRP by microneedling or targeted fine intradermal injections.
meso.step3_desc: Application of calming and regenerating products to maximise effects and reduce post-session discomfort.
meso.step4_desc: Results improve progressively over 4 to 6 weeks. A protocol of 3 to 4 sessions is recommended.
meso.forWho: Ideal for tired, dull skin or skin showing early signs of ageing. Suitable for those seeking a natural regenerating treatment using the body's own resources (PRP) or targeted medical active ingredients (mesotherapy).
meso.faq1_q: What is the difference between mesotherapy and PRP?
meso.faq1_a: Mesotherapy injects cocktails of vitamins and targeted active ingredients, while PRP uses your own blood plasma enriched with platelets. Both stimulate cell regeneration, but through distinct mechanisms.
meso.faq2_a: Slight redness or swelling may persist for 24 to 48 hours after the session. This generally does not require social avoidance.
meso.faq3_a: A protocol of 3 to 4 sessions spaced 3 to 4 weeks apart is recommended for optimal results, followed by a maintenance session every 3 to 6 months.
meso.faq4_a: An anaesthetic cream can be applied before the session for optimal comfort. The injections are fine and generally very well tolerated.

prp.name: PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma)
prp.description: PRP uses your own platelet-enriched plasma to stimulate cellular regeneration. A 100% natural treatment to rejuvenate skin, treat hair loss and reduce scarring.
prp.process: Blood draw → Centrifugation → Enriched plasma injection → Natural regeneration
prp.page_subtitle: Regenerate your skin using your body's own healing power
prp.step1_desc: Dr. Meryem evaluates your skin, hair or target area and determines the most suitable PRP protocol.
prp.step2_desc: A small blood sample is taken, just like a routine blood test. Quick and painless.
prp.step3_desc: Your blood is centrifuged to isolate the platelet-rich plasma — concentrated with natural growth factors.
prp.step4_desc: The PRP is injected into the target areas (face, scalp, neck, hands). Regeneration begins immediately.
prp.forWho: Ideal for patients seeking natural skin rejuvenation, hair loss treatment, dark circle reduction, stretch marks or acne scar improvement. Suitable for all skin types and can be combined with other treatments.
prp.faq1_a: The blood draw is similar to a routine blood test. Injections use ultra-fine needles with a numbing cream. Discomfort is minimal.
prp.faq2_a: Typically, 3 to 4 sessions spaced one month apart are recommended for optimal results. Maintenance sessions can be planned every 6 to 12 months.
prp.faq3_a: Initial results appear after 2 to 3 weeks. Improvement continues for 2 to 3 months as collagen regenerates naturally.
prp.faq4_a: Yes, scalp PRP is one of the most effective applications. It stimulates dormant hair follicles and strengthens existing hair. Visible results after 3 to 4 sessions.

cellulite.name: Cellulite Treatment
cellulite.description: Targeted body protocols to reduce the orange-peel effect and firm treated areas.
cellulite.page_subtitle: Targeted body protocols for a redefined, firm silhouette
cellulite.step1_desc: Assessment of the type of cellulite, areas to be treated and definition of the most appropriate protocol for your body.
cellulite.step2_desc: Combination of complementary technologies (radiofrequency, drainage, ultrasound) for maximum effectiveness.
cellulite.step3_desc: Programme of 6 to 10 sessions to observe progressive and lasting results in the targeted areas.
cellulite.step4_desc: Regular assessment of results and adjustment of the protocol if necessary. No recovery required.
cellulite.forWho: This treatment is suitable for women and men with localised or diffuse cellulite, particularly in the thighs, abdomen, arms or buttocks. It is suitable for all body types and can be combined with a healthy lifestyle.
cellulite.faq1_q: How many sessions to see results?
cellulite.faq1_a: First results are often visible from the 3rd or 4th session. A complete programme of 6 to 10 sessions is recommended for optimal and lasting results.
cellulite.faq2_a: The treatments are non-invasive and comfortable. You may feel slight heat or pressure depending on the technology used, but no pain.
cellulite.faq3_a: Results can last several months. Half-yearly maintenance is recommended, as well as a good lifestyle to maintain the effects obtained.
cellulite.faq4_q: Can I combine this treatment with other treatments?
cellulite.faq4_a: Yes, cellulite treatment can be effectively combined with other body treatments offered at the clinic for even more complete results.

body.name: Body Treatment
body.description: Enveloping treatments and wellness rituals to nourish, firm and illuminate the skin.
body.page_subtitle: Wellness rituals and enveloping treatments to enhance your body skin
body.step1_desc: Removal of dead cells and skin preparation to optimise absorption of subsequent treatments.
body.step2_desc: Application of an enveloping mask (clay, algae, mud or nourishing active ingredients) according to your specific needs.
body.step3_desc: Relaxing or draining massage to stimulate circulation and promote absorption of active ingredients.
body.step4_desc: Application of a rich, nourishing body treatment to seal in the benefits of the treatment.
body.forWho: This treatment is accessible to everyone, regardless of skin type. It is particularly suitable for dry, tired skin or after a period of stress. Ideal as a course or à la carte for a regular wellness break.
body.faq1_q: How long does a session last?
body.faq1_a: A body treatment session generally lasts between 60 and 90 minutes, depending on the protocol chosen and the treatments included.
body.faq2_q: Can I choose the type of wrap?
body.faq2_a: Yes, we offer different types of wraps adapted to your preferences and needs: purifying clay, remineralising algae or nourishing active ingredients.
body.faq3_a: This treatment is very well tolerated. Please inform the practitioner in case of known allergy, pregnancy or particular skin pathology.
body.faq4_a: A monthly session is ideal to maintain soft, luminous skin. Courses of 3 to 5 sessions can be carried out for more intense results.

liposuccion.name: Liposuction & 4D Lipo
liposuccion.desc: Body sculpting, fat removal, HD definition
liposuccion.description: Advanced liposuction techniques including 4D high-definition body sculpting to permanently remove stubborn fat deposits and reveal your natural musculature with precision and artistry.
liposuccion.process: Consultation & 3D mapping → Tumescent anaesthesia → Fat aspiration & 4D sculpting → Compression garment & follow-up
liposuccion.page_subtitle: Precision body sculpting for a naturally defined silhouette
liposuccion.step1_desc: Thorough assessment of your body proportions, fat distribution and aesthetic goals. A 3D scan helps plan the precise areas of fat removal and muscular definition.
liposuccion.step2_desc: Injection of a specially formulated solution into the treatment areas to minimise bleeding, reduce discomfort and facilitate precise fat extraction.
liposuccion.step3_desc: Controlled removal of excess fat using fine cannulas. In 4D Lipo, superficial liposculpture defines underlying musculature for a naturally athletic contour.
liposuccion.step4_desc: A compression garment is worn for 4 to 6 weeks to support healing and optimise results. Follow-up consultations monitor your progress at regular intervals.
liposuccion.forWho: Liposuction is suited to men and women who maintain a healthy weight but have localised fat deposits resistant to diet and exercise. Ideal candidates have good skin elasticity. 4D Lipo is particularly popular among patients seeking visible muscular definition in the abdomen, flanks, chest or arms.
liposuccion.faq1_q: How long do the results last?
liposuccion.faq1_a: Fat cells removed by liposuction do not regenerate. Results are permanent provided you maintain a stable weight through a balanced diet and regular physical activity.
liposuccion.faq2_q: What is the difference between standard liposuction and 4D Lipo?
liposuccion.faq2_a: Standard liposuction removes excess fat for a slimmer contour. 4D Lipo goes further by sculpting the superficial fat layer to reveal and enhance the underlying musculature, creating a naturally defined, athletic appearance.
liposuccion.faq3_q: When can I return to normal activities?
liposuccion.faq3_a: Most patients return to light daily activities within 3 to 5 days. Moderate exercise can typically resume after 3 weeks, with full physical activity permitted after 6 weeks.
liposuccion.faq4_a: Incisions are very small (3–4 mm) and strategically placed in natural skin folds. They fade significantly over several months and are generally imperceptible once fully healed.

abdominoplastie.name: Abdominoplasty
abdominoplastie.description: Surgical correction of excess abdominal skin and weakened muscles to restore a flat, firm stomach. Particularly effective after pregnancy or significant weight loss.
abdominoplastie.process: Consultation & planning → Surgery under general anaesthesia → Skin tightening & muscle repair → Compression & progressive recovery
abdominoplastie.page_subtitle: Restore a flat, toned abdomen with surgical precision
abdominoplastie.step1_desc: Detailed assessment of skin laxity, diastasis recti and your aesthetic goals. Pre-operative photographs and measurements guide the surgical plan.
abdominoplastie.step2_desc: The procedure is performed under general anaesthesia in a fully equipped surgical suite. Duration is typically 2 to 3 hours depending on the extent of correction required.
abdominoplastie.step3_desc: Excess skin is excised, abdominal muscles are sutured to restore a firm midline, and the remaining skin is redraped for a smooth, natural contour.
abdominoplastie.step4_desc: A compression garment is worn for 4 to 6 weeks. Drains may be placed for the first few days. Progressive return to activities over 3 to 6 weeks with regular follow-up appointments.
abdominoplastie.forWho: Abdominoplasty is ideal for patients with excess abdominal skin, stretched or separated abdominal muscles (diastasis recti), particularly after pregnancy or major weight loss. Candidates should be at a stable weight and in good general health. It is not a weight loss procedure but a body contouring surgery.
abdominoplastie.faq1_q: Can I have an abdominoplasty after a caesarean section?
abdominoplastie.faq1_a: Yes, abdominoplasty can be performed after a caesarean section. The existing scar is typically incorporated into the new incision line. We recommend waiting at least 6 to 12 months after delivery.
abdominoplastie.faq2_q: How long is the recovery period?
abdominoplastie.faq2_a: Most patients take 2 to 3 weeks off work and can resume light activities after 10 days. Full physical exercise is generally permitted after 6 weeks. Results continue to improve over several months.
abdominoplastie.faq3_a: The incision is placed low on the abdomen, along the bikini line, so it is easily concealed by underwear or swimwear. The scar fades progressively over 12 to 18 months.
abdominoplastie.faq4_q: Can I become pregnant after an abdominoplasty?
abdominoplastie.faq4_a: While pregnancy is not contraindicated, it may stretch the repaired muscles and skin. We generally advise completing your family planning before undergoing the procedure for the most durable results.

brachioplastie.name: Arm Lift
brachioplastie.description: Surgical removal of excess skin and fat from the upper arms to restore a firm, toned appearance. Ideal for patients with sagging skin due to ageing or weight loss.
brachioplastie.process: Consultation & assessment → Surgery under anaesthesia → Skin excision & contouring → Recovery & scar management
brachioplastie.page_subtitle: Restore firm, sculpted upper arms with expert surgical care
brachioplastie.step1_desc: Evaluation of skin laxity, fat deposits and your expectations. The incision placement and extent of tissue removal are discussed and planned.
brachioplastie.step2_desc: The procedure is performed under general or local anaesthesia with sedation, typically lasting 1.5 to 2 hours. The approach is tailored to the degree of correction needed.
brachioplastie.step3_desc: Excess skin and, if necessary, underlying fat are removed. The remaining tissue is carefully redraped and sutured along the inner arm for a smooth, natural contour.
brachioplastie.step4_desc: A compression sleeve is worn for 3 to 4 weeks. Scars are positioned along the inner arm and fade progressively. Scar care protocols are provided to optimise healing.
brachioplastie.forWho: This procedure is suited to adults who have lost significant skin elasticity in the upper arms, whether due to ageing, weight fluctuations or genetic predisposition. Ideal candidates are at a stable weight and bothered by excess skin that does not respond to exercise.
brachioplastie.faq1_a: The incision runs along the inner aspect of the upper arm, from the armpit towards the elbow. Its exact length depends on the amount of skin to be removed. The scar fades over time and is generally well concealed.
brachioplastie.faq2_q: Can liposuction replace an arm lift?
brachioplastie.faq2_a: Liposuction alone is effective when there is excess fat but good skin elasticity. When significant skin laxity is present, an arm lift is required to remove the redundant tissue and achieve a smooth contour.
brachioplastie.faq3_a: Light activities can resume after 2 weeks. Upper body exercises and weight training should be avoided for 6 weeks to allow proper healing of the tissues.
brachioplastie.faq4_a: Post-operative discomfort is moderate and well managed with prescribed pain medication. Most patients describe mild soreness and tightness for the first week, which subsides progressively.

lifting_cuisses.name: Thigh Lift
lifting_cuisses.description: Surgical tightening and reshaping of the thighs to eliminate excess skin and improve contour. Restores a smooth, proportionate silhouette to the lower body.
lifting_cuisses.process: Consultation & body analysis → Surgery under general anaesthesia → Tissue removal & reshaping → Compression & progressive recovery
lifting_cuisses.page_subtitle: Firm, sculpted thighs through expert surgical contouring
lifting_cuisses.step1_desc: Assessment of skin laxity, fat distribution and your goals. The optimal incision technique (inner thigh, extended, or vertical) is determined based on the degree of correction needed.
lifting_cuisses.step2_desc: The procedure typically takes 2 to 3 hours under general anaesthesia. The surgical approach is customised to address the specific pattern and location of excess tissue.
lifting_cuisses.step3_desc: Excess skin and fat are excised, and the remaining tissue is lifted and sutured to create a smooth, natural contour. Incisions are placed in the groin crease or inner thigh for discretion.
lifting_cuisses.step4_desc: Compression garments are worn for 4 to 6 weeks. Walking is encouraged from the first day. Gradual return to full activities over 4 to 6 weeks with scheduled follow-up consultations.
lifting_cuisses.forWho: A thigh lift is ideal for patients with significant skin laxity in the inner or outer thighs, often following substantial weight loss or due to age-related tissue changes. Candidates should be at a stable weight. The procedure is not designed for weight loss but for contouring and skin tightening.
lifting_cuisses.faq1_a: Incisions are placed in the groin crease or along the inner thigh where they are naturally concealed. With proper scar care, they fade significantly over 12 to 18 months.
lifting_cuisses.faq2_q: How long before I can walk normally?
lifting_cuisses.faq2_a: Gentle walking is encouraged from the day after surgery to promote circulation. Most patients walk comfortably within 7 to 10 days and resume a normal gait within 3 weeks.
lifting_cuisses.faq3_q: Can a thigh lift be combined with liposuction?
lifting_cuisses.faq3_a: Yes, combining a thigh lift with liposuction is common and can enhance the overall result by addressing both excess skin and localised fat deposits in a single procedure.
lifting_cuisses.faq4_a: Expect moderate swelling and discomfort for the first 2 weeks, managed with medication. Most patients return to sedentary work after 2 weeks and resume exercise after 6 weeks.

gynecomastie.name: Gynecomastia Surgery
gynecomastie.description: Surgical correction of enlarged male breast tissue to restore a flat, masculine chest contour. Addresses both glandular tissue and excess fat for a natural result.
gynecomastie.process: Consultation & diagnosis → Surgery (excision ± liposuction) → Chest contouring → Compression vest & recovery
gynecomastie.page_subtitle: Restore a flat, confident chest with expert male breast surgery
gynecomastie.step1_desc: Clinical examination and, if necessary, hormonal assessment to determine the cause and grade of gynecomastia. The surgical approach is planned based on the proportion of glandular tissue versus fat.
gynecomastie.step2_desc: Depending on the case, glandular tissue is excised through a small periareolar incision, liposuction is used to remove excess fat, or both techniques are combined for optimal results.
gynecomastie.step3_desc: The chest is sculpted to achieve a flat, natural masculine contour. Skin is redraped if needed to avoid irregularities or excess after tissue removal.
gynecomastie.step4_desc: A compression vest is worn for 3 to 4 weeks to minimise swelling and support the new chest shape. Most patients return to daily activities within one week.
gynecomastie.forWho: This procedure is designed for men of any age who experience enlargement of breast tissue that does not respond to diet or exercise. It is suitable whether the enlargement is due to hormonal factors, medication or idiopathic causes. Ideal candidates are in good health and at a stable weight.
gynecomastie.faq1_a: Post-operative discomfort is generally mild to moderate and well controlled with prescribed pain relief. Most patients describe a sensation of tightness rather than sharp pain, which subsides within the first week.
gynecomastie.faq2_q: Will the condition recur after surgery?
gynecomastie.faq2_a: Recurrence is rare when the underlying cause has been addressed. The removed glandular tissue does not grow back. Maintaining a stable weight and addressing any hormonal factors help ensure lasting results.
gynecomastie.faq3_q: How soon can I exercise after surgery?
gynecomastie.faq3_a: Light activities can resume after 1 week. Chest-focused exercises and weight training should be avoided for 4 to 6 weeks to allow complete healing of the tissues.
gynecomastie.faq4_a: Incisions are typically placed around the lower edge of the areola, making scars very discreet. They fade significantly over several months and are generally imperceptible.

otoplastie.name: Otoplasty
otoplastie.description: Surgical correction of prominent or asymmetrical ears to achieve a natural, balanced appearance. A delicate procedure with discreet results and rapid recovery.
otoplastie.process: Consultation & assessment → Surgery under local or general anaesthesia → Cartilage reshaping & suturing → Headband & healing
otoplastie.page_subtitle: Natural ear correction for lasting confidence
otoplastie.step1_desc: Detailed analysis of ear shape, projection and symmetry. The surgical plan is tailored to your anatomy and desired degree of correction.
otoplastie.step2_desc: The procedure is performed under local anaesthesia (adults) or general anaesthesia (children), typically lasting 45 minutes to 1.5 hours. An incision is made behind the ear for complete concealment.
otoplastie.step3_desc: The ear cartilage is carefully scored, folded or excised to create the desired shape. Internal sutures hold the new form in place for a natural, lasting result.
otoplastie.step4_desc: A protective headband is worn continuously for 1 week, then at night for 3 to 4 weeks. Sutures are removed after 7 to 10 days. Final results are visible once swelling subsides.
otoplastie.forWho: Otoplasty is suitable for adults and children (from age 7, when ear growth is nearly complete) who feel self-conscious about prominent, asymmetrical or unusually shaped ears. The procedure is equally effective for correcting one or both ears.
otoplastie.faq1_q: At what age can otoplasty be performed?
otoplastie.faq1_a: Otoplasty can be performed from age 7, when the ears have reached approximately 90% of their adult size. There is no upper age limit for the procedure.
otoplastie.faq2_a: Discomfort is generally mild and well managed with standard pain medication. Most patients describe a feeling of pressure or tightness for the first 2 to 3 days, which resolves quickly.
otoplastie.faq3_a: Absolutely. The goal is to reposition the ears closer to the head while preserving their natural folds and contours. The ears will look naturally placed, not pinned.
otoplastie.faq4_q: How long until the final result is visible?
otoplastie.faq4_a: The new ear shape is immediately apparent after surgery, but mild swelling may persist for 2 to 4 weeks. The definitive result is typically visible after 2 to 3 months.

blepharoplastie.name: Blepharoplasty
blepharoplastie.description: Surgical rejuvenation of the upper and/or lower eyelids to correct drooping, puffiness or wrinkles. Restores a refreshed, youthful and alert appearance to the eyes.
blepharoplastie.process: Consultation & eye assessment → Surgery under local anaesthesia → Excess tissue removal & sculpting → Healing & progressive results
blepharoplastie.page_subtitle: Refresh your gaze with expert eyelid rejuvenation surgery
blepharoplastie.step1_desc: Comprehensive evaluation of the eyelid skin, fat pads, muscle tone and tear trough area. Photographs and measurements guide the surgical plan for natural, harmonious results.
blepharoplastie.step2_desc: The procedure is typically performed under local anaesthesia with sedation, lasting 1 to 2 hours. Upper and lower eyelids can be treated simultaneously or separately.
blepharoplastie.step3_desc: Redundant skin, protruding fat pads and, if needed, a thin strip of muscle are precisely removed or repositioned. Incisions follow the natural eyelid crease for invisible scarring.
blepharoplastie.step4_desc: Swelling and mild bruising resolve over 7 to 14 days. Cold compresses and prescribed eye drops support healing. The final refreshed appearance develops over 2 to 3 months.
blepharoplastie.forWho: Blepharoplasty is ideal for men and women who notice drooping upper eyelids, under-eye bags, puffiness or excess skin that makes them appear tired or older. Candidates should be in good general health and have realistic expectations. The procedure can be combined with other facial rejuvenation treatments for a comprehensive result.
blepharoplastie.faq1_q: Will blepharoplasty change the shape of my eyes?
blepharoplastie.faq1_a: No. The procedure is designed to rejuvenate without altering the fundamental shape or character of your eyes. The result is a refreshed, well-rested appearance that looks entirely natural.
blepharoplastie.faq2_q: How long do the results last?
blepharoplastie.faq2_a: Results typically last 7 to 10 years or more for upper eyelid surgery. Lower eyelid results are generally long-lasting as well. The ageing process continues naturally, but the improvement remains significant.
blepharoplastie.faq3_q: When can I wear contact lenses or make-up again?
blepharoplastie.faq3_a: Contact lenses can usually be worn again after 1 to 2 weeks. Make-up around the eyes can be applied after 10 to 14 days, once the incisions have healed sufficiently.
blepharoplastie.faq4_a: Mild bruising and swelling are common for the first week but can be concealed with sunglasses. Most patients feel comfortable returning to social and professional activities within 7 to 10 days.

mammoplastie.name: Breast Surgery
mammoplastie.description: Comprehensive breast surgery including augmentation, reduction and lift procedures. Tailored to your anatomy and personal goals for a harmonious, natural result.
mammoplastie.process: Consultation & imaging → Surgery under general anaesthesia → Tissue reshaping or implant placement → Recovery & long-term follow-up
mammoplastie.page_subtitle: Personalised breast surgery for confidence and harmony
mammoplastie.step1_desc: In-depth discussion of your goals, body proportions and lifestyle. 3D imaging may be used to simulate results and help choose the ideal approach: augmentation, reduction or lift.
mammoplastie.step2_desc: The procedure is performed under general anaesthesia in a state-of-the-art surgical suite. Duration varies from 1.5 to 3 hours depending on the type and complexity of the surgery.
mammoplastie.step3_desc: For augmentation, implants are placed through discreet incisions. For reduction, excess tissue is removed and the breast reshaped. For a lift, sagging tissue is repositioned and tightened for a youthful contour.
mammoplastie.step4_desc: A support bra is worn for 4 to 6 weeks. Return to daily activities within 1 to 2 weeks, with full exercise permitted after 6 weeks. Regular follow-up ensures optimal healing and satisfaction.
mammoplastie.forWho: Breast surgery is suited to women seeking augmentation for naturally small or asymmetrical breasts, reduction for overly large breasts causing discomfort, or a lift to correct ptosis after pregnancy, weight loss or ageing. Candidates should be in good health and have completed breast development.
mammoplastie.faq1_q: How do I choose between implants and a lift?
mammoplastie.faq1_a: During your consultation, we assess your breast volume, skin quality and degree of ptosis. Some patients benefit from implants alone, others from a lift, and many from a combination. The recommendation is tailored entirely to your anatomy and goals.
mammoplastie.faq2_q: What types of implants do you use?
mammoplastie.faq2_a: We use the latest generation silicone cohesive gel implants from leading European manufacturers. Shape, volume and profile are selected based on your body measurements and desired outcome.
mammoplastie.faq3_q: Will breastfeeding be possible after surgery?
mammoplastie.faq3_a: In most cases, yes. Augmentation with implants placed behind the muscle or through an inframammary incision generally preserves breastfeeding ability. We discuss this thoroughly during your consultation.
mammoplastie.faq4_q: How long do the results last?
mammoplastie.faq4_a: A breast lift and reduction provide long-lasting results, though natural ageing and gravity continue to have an effect over time. Implants are durable and may last 10 to 15 years or more before a review is considered.

doctors.title: Our Medical Team
doctors.subtitle: Surgery & Aesthetic Medicine under one roof
doctors.couple_headline: A Unique Medical Duo in Tangier
doctors.couple_text: Dr. Meryem and Dr. Amr form a unique medical duo in Tangier — the only clinic combining plastic surgery and aesthetic medicine under one roof, led by two complementary specialists with a shared commitment to your beauty.
doctors.meryem_bio: Dr. El Boujadaini Meryem is a specialist in aesthetic medicine, anti-ageing and medical lasers. Passionate about natural beauty and the wellbeing of her patients, she offers personalised treatments combining medical expertise with a human approach. Trained in the latest injection techniques and laser technologies, she guides each patient on an authentic beauty journey. At Refine Clinic, her philosophy is clear: enhance, never transform.
doctors.amr_bio: Dr. Amr Ismail is an aesthetic and plastic surgeon, recognised for his expertise in body and facial surgery. Trained to international standards in plastic surgery, he performs highly precise procedures with a keen sense of aesthetics and patient safety. At Refine Clinic, he oversees all surgical procedures in a rigorous and reassuring medical environment, with a focus on natural results tailored to each patient's morphology and wishes.
doctors.headline:
Two experts,
one shared vision
doctors.callout_headline:
A unique medical
duo in Tangier
doctors.meryem_philosophy: "Enhance, never transform." — Dr. Meryem prioritises natural, harmonious results while respecting each patient's unique features.
doctors.amr_philosophy: Dr. Amr performs every procedure with surgical precision and a keen aesthetic sense — for natural, harmonious and lasting results.

about.title: About Refine Clinic
about.subtitle: Medical excellence in the service of your beauty
about.storyTitle: A Unique Medical Duo in Tangier
about.storyP1: Refine Clinic was born from a shared vision: to offer the people of Tangier and Morocco access to outstanding aesthetic and surgical care, in a rigorous medical environment with a warm atmosphere.
about.storyP2: Founded by Dr. El Boujadaini Meryem and Dr. Amr Ismail — a couple of specialist physicians — Refine Clinic is the only clinic in Tangier combining aesthetic medicine and plastic surgery under one roof, led by two complementary experts.
about.storyP3: Our philosophy: enhance every patient while respecting their nature, body shape and wishes. Never transform. Always reveal.
about.doctorsCaption: Dr. Meryem & Dr. Amr — Refine Clinic

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our treatments and clinic
faq.general_a1: We are open Monday to Saturday from 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM. Book an appointment by phone, WhatsApp or through our online form.
faq.general_q2: How do I book an appointment?
faq.general_a2: You can reach us by phone at 05399 42632, via WhatsApp at +212539942632, or fill in our online consultation form. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
faq.general_a3: Refine Clinic is located at Centre Business Salman, Avenue Abi Al Hassan Echadli, 4th floor, App.16, Tangier.
faq.general_q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.general_a4: We accept cash and bank transfers. Ask about instalment payment options during your consultation.
faq.aesthetic_q1: Are Botox or filler injections painful?
faq.aesthetic_a1: Injections are performed with a numbing cream and ultra-fine needles. Discomfort is minimal and short-lived.
faq.aesthetic_q2: How long do Botox results last?
faq.aesthetic_a2: Botox results generally last between 4 and 6 months, depending on the patient and the treated area.
faq.aesthetic_q3: What is the minimum age for aesthetic treatments?
faq.aesthetic_a3: Each case is assessed individually during the consultation. Generally, preventive treatments can begin from age 25.
faq.laser_q1: How many laser hair removal sessions are needed?
faq.laser_a1: On average, 6 to 8 sessions spaced 4 to 6 weeks apart are needed for optimal, lasting results.
faq.laser_a2: The technology used at Refine Clinic is designed to minimise discomfort. Most patients describe a slight warm sensation.
faq.laser_a3: All body areas: legs, underarms, bikini line, back, face, arms and more.
faq.surgery_q1: What happens during a first surgical consultation?
faq.surgery_a1: Dr. Amr conducts a thorough assessment, listens to your goals, explains the available options and answers all your questions. No decisions are made during the initial consultation.
faq.surgery_q2: How long is the recovery after liposuction?
faq.surgery_a2: Light activity can resume after 1 week. Full recovery takes 4 to 6 weeks depending on the patient.
faq.surgery_a3: Results are long-lasting provided you maintain a healthy lifestyle. Dr. Amr provides personalised post-operative follow-up.
faq.safety_q1: Who performs the treatments at Refine Clinic?
faq.safety_a1: All procedures are performed exclusively by the clinic's physicians — Dr. Meryem for aesthetic medicine and Dr. Amr for surgery. Never delegated to non-medical assistants.
faq.safety_q2: Are there contraindications for aesthetic treatments?
faq.safety_a2: Some treatments have contraindications (pregnancy, autoimmune conditions, certain medications). Everything is assessed during your initial medical consultation.
faq.notListedDesc: Contact us directly — our team responds within 24 hours.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.subtitle: Legal information and privacy policy
legal.privacyDesc: Refine Clinic is committed to protecting the privacy of its patients and visitors. Personal information collected through our website (contact and consultation forms) is used exclusively to respond to your enquiries and schedule your appointments.
legal.dataDesc: Your personal data is never sold, rented or shared with third parties without your consent. It is stored securely and used solely within the scope of your relationship with Refine Clinic.
legal.cookiesDesc: This site uses essential cookies for proper website functionality. No advertising or tracking cookies are used.
legal.contactDesc: For any questions regarding your personal data or this privacy policy, please contact us.
legal.rightsDesc: In accordance with Moroccan Law 09-08 on the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your personal data.
